description: Style Note Lightweight and stylish, this T-shirt from adidas is comfortable and looks great. Designed with a dash of colours for a casual feminine look, this tee can be paired with denim shorts for a casual outing. Product Details White T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, graphic multi-coloured print in front and branding above the hemline Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33") is wearing a size M
